name: Snicker Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Graham cracker crust or Chocolate crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the snickers bars, peanut butter, and half & half together in a double boiler.
2. Fold in the Cool Whip.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
4. Freeze for 4-5 hours before serving.
5. Top with additional Cool Whip and chocolate syrup.
